title: RapidMeta Cardiology | Aldosterone Synthase Inhibitors in Resistant Hypertension NMA v1.0
hero_h2: Aldosterone Synthase Inhibitors in Resistant Hypertension

pico.pop: Adults with treatment-resistant hypertension despite stable use of >=2-3 antihypertensives at maximally-tolerated doses (including a thiazide-type diuretic)
pico.int: Aldosterone synthase inhibitor (baxdrostat 1/2/4 mg, lorundrostat 12.5/25/50/100 mg) orally once daily
pico.comp: Placebo on top of background antihypertensive therapy
pico.out: Change in office or 24-hour ambulatory systolic BP at 8-12 weeks (mmHg, MD vs placebo)
pico.subgroup: Background therapy (3 vs >=4 agents), baseline plasma renin / aldosterone, baseline eGFR, race

real_data_entries.name: BrigHTN
real_data_entries.group: Treatment-resistant HTN, baxdrostat 0.5/1/2 mg vs placebo (12-wk SBP MD; phase 2 dose-finding)

allOutcomes.title: Mean change in office SBP at week 12 (mmHg, baxdrostat 2 mg vs placebo MD; primary)
Mean change in office SBP at week 12 (mmHg, baxdrostat 1 mg vs placebo MD; secondary)
Mean change in office SBP at week 12 (mmHg, baxdrostat 0.5 mg vs placebo MD; secondary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Freeman MW et al. NEJM 2023;388:395-405 (BrigHTN, phase 2 baxdrostat).

real_data_entries.name: Target-HTN
real_data_entries.group: Treatment-resistant or uncontrolled HTN, lorundrostat 12.5/50/100 mg QD vs placebo (8-wk 24-h ABPM SBP MD)

allOutcomes.title: Mean change in 24-h ABPM SBP at week 8 (mmHg, lorundrostat 100 mg vs placebo MD; primary)
Mean change in 24-h ABPM SBP at week 8 (mmHg, lorundrostat 50 mg vs placebo MD; secondary)
Mean change in 24-h ABPM SBP at week 8 (mmHg, lorundrostat 12.5 mg vs placebo MD; secondary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Laffin LJ et al. JAMA 2023;330:1140-1150 (Target-HTN, phase 2 lorundrostat).
